title: Validated Message
description: Schema for validated message data including multiple telemetries from building devices

validTelemetry.title: Validated Telemetry
validTelemetry.description: Schema for validated telemetry data from Building devices

point_id.description: Unique identifier for the telemetry point

value.description: Representative value of the telemetry data

data.description: Additional data associated with the telemetry point

datetime.description: Date and time when the telemetry data was recorded in ISO 8601 format

building.description: Name of the building the telemetry point belongs to

name.description: Optional name of the telemetry point
